headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -65.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 60% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 136 quotes and an overwhelming 93 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 52.3 sits in the upper third of the 117-day range, indicating elevated but not extreme levels compared to historical peaks.

• Fears improved notably from yesterday's low while frustrations eased slightly, though both remain at concerning levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
